description_long: This doll features a whimsical design with a large, round head resembling a red strawberry, complete with green leaves and white seeds on top. The face is stylized with closed eyes, a small mouth, and a neutral expression, giving it a calm demeanor. The body is dressed in a strapless, dark brown dress with a jagged hem and two large buttons on the front, evoking the look of chocolate or a dessert theme. The arms and legs are simple and cylindrical, with the legs ending in brown shoes adorned with white bows and white socks. The overall proportions are chibi-like, with a large head and small body, enhancing its playful and toy-like appearance. The surface appears smooth and slightly matte, typical of plastic or vinyl dolls.
description: A chibi-style doll with a large strawberry-shaped head, closed eyes, and a chocolate-themed dress with brown shoes and white socks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the strawberry head, closed eyes, chocolate dress with buttons, and brown shoes with white bows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the roundness of the strawberry head and the simple profile of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the green leaves on top of the head and the plain back of the dress and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the doll's profile and the smooth, rounded contours of the head and limbs.
attribute_clothing_style: Strapless, jagged-hem dark brown dress with two large front buttons, paired with white socks and brown shoes featuring white bows; the style is playful and dessert-inspired, reminiscent of chocolate-themed costumes.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed and slightly extended to the sides, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward, and torso upright in a static, neutral pose.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with closed eyes, straight eyebrows, and a small, straight mouth, conveying calmness.
attribute_hair_style: Short, smooth, and rounded red hair styled to resemble a strawberry, with green leaves and white seed-like spots on top.
